fields.helpText: This field contains a referral source used to describe how the patient was referred to the Women Veterans Health Program.  The source can be a clinic, a special event (e.g., health fair), newspaper advertisement, or individual (such as a primary provider, self, other patient).
This field stores a set of codes (1 = active and 0 = inactive) used to display or hide an entry in a selection list.  If the field is active, users of this package can select the entry.
This field converts the referral source to all capital letters for  x-referencing.
